nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 考卡河
nodes.summary: 考卡河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联19种鸟类，包括Cauca guan、Chestnut-winged chachalaca、Blackish rail等19种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 雨燕目
nodes.summary: 雨燕目（Apodiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联177种鸟类，如Starry owlet-nightjar、Wallace's owlet-nightjar、Mountain owlet-nightjar等177种鸟类。

nodes.name: 蜂鸟科
nodes.summary: 蜂鸟科（Trochilidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联90种鸟类，如黑蜂鸟、白颈蜂鸟、火红叉尾蜂鸟等90种鸟类。

nodes.name: 洛哈省
nodes.summary: 洛哈省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联16种鸟类，包括淡眉穴䳍、茶腹隐蜂鸟、秘鲁蜂鸟等16种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 马格达莱纳河
nodes.summary: 马格达莱纳河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联31种鸟类，包括黑颈冠叫鸭、藍嘴鳳冠雉、Chestnut-winged chachalaca等31种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 圣马丁大区
nodes.summary: 圣马丁大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联30种鸟类，包括茶腹隐蜂鸟、灰颏隐蜂鸟、皇领蜂鸟等30种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 茶腹隐蜂鸟
nodes.summary: 茶腹隐蜂鸟（Tawny-bellied hermit，学名 Phaethornis syrmatophorus），分类上属于雨燕目，并归入蜂鸟科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The nominate subspecies of tawny-bellied hermit is found in the Western Andes of Colombia (including the valleys of the Cauca and Patía rivers) and locally south on the western Andean slope through Ecuador to western Loja Province

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The nominate subspecies of tawny-bellied hermit is found in the Western Andes of Colombia (including the valleys of the Cauca and Patía rivers) and locally south on the western Andean slope through Ecuador to western Loja Province

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: columbianus is found in the Central and Eastern Andes of Colombia (including the southern Magdalena River valley) and south on the Andes' eastern slope through Ecuador to northern Peru's San Martín Department

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: columbianus is found in the Central and Eastern Andes of Colombia (including the southern Magdalena River valley) and south on the Andes' eastern slope through Ecuador to northern Peru's San Martín Department

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It principally inhabits the understory of humid montane forest but is also found at forest edges and in dense secondary forest

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It principally inhabits the understory of humid montane forest but is also found at forest edges and in dense secondary forest

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The IUCN has assessed the tawny-bellied hermit as being of Least Concern, though its population size is unknown and believed to be decreasing. It is found in some protected areas, but "habitat loss may be a severe threat in the future."
